milestones.title: ✅ Daily Stock Scan (Gemini CLI Re-run)
milestones.changes: Initial Gemini API quota failure → Jason ordered re-run via Gemini CLI. Executed successfully. RGTI (gov contract + earnings), IONQ (blowout earnings), QUBT ($9.12 +5%), QBTS ($18-18.64). Delivered to Telegram 8292946837.

milestones.title: ✅ Morning Brief (07:30 GMT+4)
milestones.changes: Weather (21°C sunny), Dubai RE market (+63% YoY nuclear), APEX deployment status, Google Antigravity IDE launch, crypto market (Extreme Fear 13, BTC support $67K). Telegram delivered.

milestones.title: ✅ BTC Sentiment Analysis
milestones.changes: Jason requested BTC target. Real-time Gemini CLI search: Current $67,188-67,468, CAUTIOUSLY BULLISH, support $67K, resistance $68.5-69K, target $72,838 (algo), key driver ETF inflows ($297M BlackRock). Verdict: Dip buyers bullish.

milestones.title: ✅ Work Laptop Hardware Specs
milestones.changes: Provided full specs: i9-14900HX, 32GB RAM, RTX 4070 (8GB), 1TB NVMe, Win11 Pro, 3x displays (3440x1440@179Hz + 2x2560x1440@143Hz). Beast machine.

milestones.title: ✅ Universal Model Monitor Scan (08:00 GMT+4)
milestones.changes: 78 models scanned. NEW: Gemini Nano Banana 2 (MID tier, 65K tokens, image gen), Codex CLI 0.106.0 (available update). DEPRECATED: Codex 0.105.0. Telegram alert failed (routing conflict), delivered in Discord instead. GitHub committed.

milestones.title: ✅ Failed Message Explanation
milestones.changes: Jason asked about failed message. Explained: Telegram alert from model monitor failed due to cross-context routing (Discord-bound session couldn't send to Telegram). Recommended isolated mode for future crons.

milestones.title: 🔲 APEX Platform
milestones.changes: 100% built, all components wired, Strategy Theme applied. Path A vs Path B decision pending from Jason.

milestones.title: ⚔️ GOD TRADER v4.3 (Freqtrade)
milestones.changes: 35 pairs, 10 max open, loosened params. Paper trading active. Monitoring execution profitability.

milestones.title: 🔱 GOD SIGNAL STOCKS — Critical Bug Fixes
milestones.changes: Found 3 bugs: (1) yfinance end param is exclusive — was excluding today's data. IONQ showed $40.88 (yesterday) instead of $36.73. (2) Wrong direction: +21.7% (yesterday) vs actual -9.4% today. (3) Duplicate alerts saved every cycle. Fixes: Added +1 day to end_date in volume_scanner.py + technical_scanner.py, added 2-hour dedup check to save_alert(). Engine restarted, Cycle 1 running, ETA ~21:15 GMT+4.

milestones.title: 🔌 IBKR API Integration — CONNECTED ✅
milestones.changes: IBKR Paper Trading logged in successfully. Netsh portproxy configured: 4003 → localhost:4002. Windows firewall rule added. ib_insync installed in venv, test connection successful. Connection path: WSL (172.19.190.143) → Windows Wi-Fi IP (192.168.50.44:4003) → netsh relay → localhost:4002. Issue: Paper account has no market data subscriptions (live session competing). Options: (1) Close IBKR on mobile, (2) Add $10/mo extra data line, (3) Use for scanners only. Ready for next phase once market data decision made.
